description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the pnicol/android_sdk_28 Docker image and defines two stages: build and quality. Add a build:debug job in the build stage that runs ./gradlew clean :app:assembleDebug and stores the generated APKs from app/build/outputs/apk/ as artifacts. Add a quality:lint job in the quality stage that runs ./gradlew clean :app:lintDebug. No caches, services, or special rules are needed.
